mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Category WHERE CategoryStatus = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Product WHERE Title LIKE '%Daire%'
SELECT AVG(Price) FROM Product WHERE Type = 'Kiralık'
SELECT AVG(Price) FROM Product WHERE Type = 'Satılık'
SELECT CategoryName FROM Product INNER JOIN Category ON Product.ProductCategory = Category.CategoryID GROUP BY CategoryName ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT City FROM Product GROUP BY City ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT Name FROM Product INNER JOIN AppUser ON Product.AppUserId = AppUser.UserId GROUP BY Name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT Price FROM Product ORDER BY ProductID DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT BuildYear FROM ProductDetails ORDER BY BuildYear DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT BuildYear FROM ProductDetails ORDER BY BuildYear ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Category WHERE CategoryStatus = 0
